comment: Wholesale (foodservice) pair register, parallel to pairs.json but separate: wholesale rows never enter the retail history. Sources: JJ Foodservice (/product/england/<SKU> pages, schema.org JSON-LD offers per branch; Collection price at the Enfield EN-MW branch is the canonical price, ex-VAT sitewide per its T&Cs 5.4) and Brakes (product pages, ng-state blob; anonymous indicative price, 'average customer discount', nettPrices=false). 'amount' is the hand-verified total pack weight/volume (from the distributor's own pack-size field, cross-checked against its published per-kg unit price on 2026-07-07; same-brand additions cross-checked 2026-07-22 via the Brakes OCC product API and JJ JSON-LD); per-100 figures are computed from it. Probed and curated 2026-07-07: Booker and Costco UK are bot-blocked at the Akamai edge; Bidfood is account-gated (a static snapshot from a trade account lives in pairs_bidfood_static.json, rendered separately, never scraped). Same-brand sweep 2026-07-22: pairs where one brand sells both the animal and the plant-based line carry same_brand=true. CORRECTION to the 07-07 note: Brakes NOW lists vegan mayonnaise (Hellmann's Vegan 2L/5L, Sysco Classic Vegan 1/2.2/5/10L; new listings since curation). Still true at 07-22: neither JJ nor Brakes lists a vegan coleslaw; JJ lists 28 beef burgers and no beef-style plant burger; no Richmond and no Ginsters at Brakes; no vegan Pukka pie, no Magnum, no plant milk-brand overlap at JJ. xcheck='skip' on a product side disables the scraper's per-100 cross-check against the distributor's own unit price: Brakes' published per-litre figures for bulk mayonnaise are computed from net MASS (kg) on some lines and pack VOLUME (litres) on others (verified 2026-07-22: Hellmann's Real 22.94/4.695kg=4.89 vs Vegan 17.70/5L=3.54), so a volume-consistent pair legitimately disagrees with one side's published unit price. AHDB publishes deadweight (carcase) prices only, no plant-based wholesale series exists.

pairs.note: Branded tier both sides (Quorn vs Blakemans). Meat side replaced 2026-07-22: SGS103 (JJ Butchers 8s, pork 42%) was out of stock at every branch since curation and lost its Collection offers on 2026-07-15. Blakemans Premier is pork (50%), same 8-per-pound (57g) frozen format; pack weight consistent between name (1x4.54kg) and size field (1x80). Larger pack than the plant side (4.54kg vs 2kg; bulk pricing flatters the meat side). Cumberland SGS035 re-rejected 2026-07-22 (weight/count contradiction persists); Tasty Bake 'pork' lines are chicken 24%/pork 14% by ingredients; JJ Quality lines are chicken.

meat.label: JJ Frozen UK Halal Minced Beef 10% Fat 2x1kg

pairs.note: Both frozen, own-brand tier. Beef side is 10% fat: JJ lists no 20% fat mince (the retail comparator tier), and leaner mince is more expensive, so this ratio flatters the plant side relative to the retail convention.
Same 1kg pack both sides, both fully cooked frozen. The beef meatball declares 55% beef content.

meat.label: Paragon Halal Fully Cooked Battered Chicken Breast Fillets 18x115g

pairs.note: Coated chicken-style burger pair (buttermilk-coated mycoprotein vs battered whole-muscle chicken breast), both fully cooked frozen catering patties. JJ lists no beef-style plant burger against its 28 beef burger lines.
Same brand both sides (mirrors the retail Heinz pair) but pack sizes differ (5L vs 10L; larger packs are usually cheaper per litre, which inflates the vegan side's per-litre figure).
Same brand both sides; pack sizes differ (5L vs 10L), same caveat as the Heinz pair.

Same brand both sides (added 2026-07-22). Pack sizes differ strongly (1L vs 2x2.27L; bulk pricing flatters the non-vegan side) and the vegan line is badged Premium while Thick & Creamy is the standard line.

Own-label both sides (KaterVeg is JJ Foodservice's plant-based own brand, the same pairing tier as the jj-mince pair; added 2026-07-22). Both frozen 40-count catering packs; roll sizes differ (100g vs 138g), so compare per 100g, not per roll.

meat.label: Prime Meats British 80% Old English Pork Sausage 6s 36x76g

pairs.note: Chilled butcher-style tier both sides (branded premium plant vs 80% pork butcher-style).

Tier mismatch flagged: branded plant sausage vs own-brand traditional pork in a much larger catering pack (Brakes lists no own-brand plant sausage in a standard frozen format). Similar sausage sizes (50g vs 57g).
Both frozen foodservice lines; the beef side is the standard 20% fat tier, matching the retail comparator convention.

Comparator is pork, not beef (the only beef meatball line, Green Gourmet, no longer renders a live page and appears delisted). Both cooked. The plant side was on promotion at curation (was-price recorded by the scraper).
Comparable patty sizes (109g vs 113g), both frozen fast-food tier (own/foodservice brands both sides).

Same brand AND same 5L pack size both sides (added 2026-07-22; the cleanest same-brand pair at any distributor). Both amounts are the stated 5L pack volume; Brakes' own published per-litre figures mix a net-mass basis (Real: 22.94/4.695kg) with a volume basis (Vegan: 17.70/5L), so the register cross-check is disabled on both sides and the volume basis is used consistently.

Own-label both sides (Sysco Classic is the house range of Brakes' parent company), same 5L pack size (added 2026-07-22; both listed at 15.19 GBP at curation). Cross-check disabled for the same mass-vs-volume unit-price basis reason as the Hellmann's pair.

plant.label: Pukka Wrapped & Baked Vegan Chicken & Mushroom Pie 12x230g

meat.label: Pukka Individually Wrapped Baked Chicken & Mushroom Pies 36x223g

pairs.note: Same brand AND same variety (chicken and mushroom), both wrapped ready-baked frozen pies (added 2026-07-22). Amounts are Brakes' stated net weights (2.76kg/12 = 230g per vegan pie; 8.03kg/36 = 223g per meat pie); the meat side comes in a 3x larger case, which flatters it on bulk pricing.

Same brand and same variant (almond), 20-stick catering boxes both sides (added 2026-07-22; the dairy-vs-vegan stick sizes, 100ml vs 90ml, mirror the retail Magnum pair, so per-100ml is the comparable basis).
Same brand, smoke-flavour slices both sides (added 2026-07-22). Pack sizes differ strongly (200g vs 750g; bulk pricing flatters the dairy side).
